narrative:
Wabash Twp township has 634 registered voters, with 43.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 51.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 46.2 percentage points.
